caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a high bun and curls sits in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red graphic design. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a stand and wears black over-ear headphones. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring white text that reads "BESS TALK 101", "It's X tastic Hustle", "ODCAST", and "Talk About It!". To her right, the backdrop includes "with U". To the left of the woman, a framed picture hangs on a white wall, and several small glasses sit on a table in front of her. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a similar position, looking slightly to her right with a contemplative expression. There is very little movement between the frames, with only slight shifts in her facial expression and posture as she listens or prepares to speak.
